name: Capitalist Bus Driver
author: Poki
description: Capitalist Bus Driver is a simulation game where driving is just the beginning! Pick up passengers around the city, drop them off at the beach resort, and help them to get in and enjoy all kinds of equipments. Use your earnings to expand and upgrade the beach resort, turning it into a thriving hotspot. Hop in, collect your fares, and grow your seaside empire today! How to play Capitalist Bus Driver? Click or tap to make the choice. Use WASD, the arrow keys, or the joystick to move. Who created Capitalist Bus Driver? Capitalist Bus Driver is created by Xscape. Play their other games on Poki: Sweet Ball Sprint ! How can I play Capitalist Bus Driver for free? You can play Capitalist Bus Driver for free on Poki. Can I play Capitalist Bus Driver on mobile devices and desktop? Capitalist Bus Driver can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
